---
title: ""
---

:::: {style="display: flex; gap: 30px"}

::: {style="flex: 40%;"}

<div class="card" style="text-align:center;">

<img src="images/biraj.png" width="180" style="border-radius:50%; margin-bottom:15px;">

## Biraj Bhattarai

**Qualifications:**  

PhD Candidate in Communication Sciences and Disorders   <br>
MS in Speech-Language Pathology    <br>
BS in Audiology and Speech-Language Pathology    <br>

<br>

<i class="bi bi-mortarboard-fill"></i> <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=JczcLwkAAAAJ&hl=en" target="_blank">Google Scholar |</a>
<i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/biraj-bhattarai-3172931a3/" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>

</div>

:::

::: {style="flex: 65%;"}


<br>
Life Story; Origin story
<br>
<br>

Deleniti est velit error similique quas nobis accusantium cumque. Velit dolor corrupti eum repudiandae et consequatur illo nihil. Amet officiis est rerum sunt. Dolorem exercitationem recusandae et fuga est dolorum et. Qui id fugit maiores neque nesciunt dolorem atque temporibus. Est inventore eius mollitia assumenda quae.

Accusantium quidem ut et ipsam nobis. Atque ex reprehenderit sequi quod. Commodi qui fuga ut a doloribus optio. Modi omnis ut autem nihil asperiores qui harum eveniet. Impedit molestiae sint similique necessitatibus ea quo quis ut.

Fugiat eum quidem dolores et fugit aspernatur qui. Nulla at similique deleniti qui temporibus voluptatibus perferendis maxime. Quibusdam ut facere quo ut velit. Aut in quidem qui sed. Quaerat dolore cupiditate maxime.

:::

::::


:::: {style="display: flex; gap: 30px"}

::: {style="flex: 40%;"}

<div class="card" style="text-align:center;">

<img src="images/sajana.png" width="180" style="border-radius:50%; margin-bottom:15px;">

## Dr. Sajana Aryal

**Qualifications:**  

PhD in Speech, Language, and Hearing Science  <br>
MS in Audiology / Hearing Science  <br>
BS in Audiology and Speech-Language Pathology  

<br>

<i class="bi bi-globe"></i> <a href="https://sites.google.com/view/sajanaaryal/home" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Website |</a>
<i class="bi bi-mortarboard-fill"></i> <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&pli=1&user=BUryX9QAAAAJ" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Google Scholar |</a>
<i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/sajana-aryal-209612187/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">LinkedIn</a>
</div>


:::

::: {style="flex: 65%;"}


<br>
Life Story; Origin story
<br>
<br>

Deleniti est velit error similique quas nobis accusantium cumque. Velit dolor corrupti eum repudiandae et consequatur illo nihil. Amet officiis est rerum sunt. Dolorem exercitationem recusandae et fuga est dolorum et. Qui id fugit maiores neque nesciunt dolorem atque temporibus. Est inventore eius mollitia assumenda quae.

Accusantium quidem ut et ipsam nobis. Atque ex reprehenderit sequi quod. Commodi qui fuga ut a doloribus optio. Modi omnis ut autem nihil asperiores qui harum eveniet. Impedit molestiae sint similique necessitatibus ea quo quis ut.

Fugiat eum quidem dolores et fugit aspernatur qui. Nulla at similique deleniti qui temporibus voluptatibus perferendis maxime. Quibusdam ut facere quo ut velit. Aut in quidem qui sed. Quaerat dolore cupiditate maxime.

:::

::::



:::: {style="display: flex; gap: 30px"}

::: {style="flex: 40%;"}

<div class="card" style="text-align:center;">

<img src="images/pratik.png" width="180" style="border-radius:50%; margin-bottom:15px;">

## Dr. Pratik Bhandari

**Qualifications:**  

PhD in Cognitive Science (Psychology & Language Science)
<br>
MS in Cognitive Neuroscience of Language
<br>
BS in Audiology and Speech-Language Pathology   

<br>

<i class="bi bi-globe"></i> <a href="https://www.pratikb.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Website |</a>
<i class="bi bi-mortarboard-fill"></i> <a href="https://scholar.google.de/citations?user=Y0HnEQwAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Google Scholar |</a>
<i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/prbhx/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">LinkedIn</a>

</div>



:::

::: {style="flex: 65%;"}

Dr. Pratik Bhandari is a registered audiologist and speech-language pathologist/speech therapist at Nepal Health Professional Council, Nepal.
He has an extensive experience over a decade in cognitive & brain sciences and language sciences.
He serves as an Adjunct Faculty member at the National Academy of Medical Sciences, Bir Hospital in Kathmandu.
In addition, he is also a reserch scientist at the Nepal Center for Cognition and Society (NCCS).

After completing his undergraduate degree in audiology and speech-language pathology from the Institute of Medicine at Tribhuvan University in Nepal (2015),
he did a brief stint at BnC Medical College Teaching Hospital, Jhapa.
He then worked at the Center for Neural and Cognitive Sciences, Hyderabad University in India (2016-17).
Soon he moved to Spain for a Masters in Cognitive Neuroscience of Language (2018).
Then he completed his PhD from Saarland University in Germany in 2022/23.
He then returned to Nepal and has been working as a speech therapist, bridging the research of cognitive and brain sciences with the clinical practice of audiology and speech therapy.

His unique position of having gained the expertise across the domains of cognitive and language sciences allows him to serve clients and patients with the cutting-edge evidence-based methods, tools and techniques rarely available across the globe.

:::

::::

---
